subparts.text: Discuss the significance of system calls in operating systems. 2.5
Explain the role of process states in CPU scheduling with a diagram. 2.5
Explain the concept of contiguous memory allocation in operating systems. What are the challenges associated with this method. 2.5
What is a critical section? State and explain the conditions to be satisfied by a solution to the critical section problem 2.5
Differentiate between: i) Preemptive Scheduling and Non-Preemptive Scheduling ii) Short-Term Scheduler and Long-Term Scheduler 5
Describe the concept of multithreading in operating systems. What are the advantages of multithreaded programming over single-threaded environments? 5

Consider the set of 6 processes whose arrival time and burst time are given below- Process ID Arrival Time Brust Time P1 0 4 P2 1 5 P3 2 2 P4 3 1 P5 4 6 P6 6 3 If the CPU scheduling policy is Round Robin with time quantum = 2, calculate the average waiting time and average turnaround time. 5

Given the page reference string: 1, 2, 3, 4, 2, 1, 5, 6, 2, 1, 2, 3, 7, 6, 3, 2, 1, 2, 3, 6, Evaluate the performance of FIFO, LRU, and Optimal page replacement algorithms. Assume there are four frames available. Compare the number of page faults generated by each algorithm for this sequence. 5
Explain with the help of a supporting diagram, how Translation Look-aside Buffer improves the performance of a paging system. 5
Define virtual memory and its role in computing. Describe a technique that uses virtual memory, detailing its process and effect on system performance. 5
